name: GitHub REST API
description: Core GitHub REST API operations — repos, issues, pull requests, and releases.

name: OpenAI API
description: Chat completions, embeddings, and image generation via the OpenAI API.

name: Anthropic Claude API
description: Messages API and token counting for Claude models.

name: Stripe Payments API
description: Create customers, charge cards, manage subscriptions, and inspect payment intents.

name: Slack API
description: Post messages, manage channels, and look up users via the Slack Web API.

name: Linear API
description: Create and query issues, cycles, and teams via the Linear GraphQL API.

name: Notion API
description: Query databases, create pages, and update blocks via the Notion API.

name: Vercel API
description: Manage deployments, projects, domains, and environment variables via the Vercel REST API.
